artifact: RCA report: inconclusive. I could not execute the district SIPO-share outlier query. The intended result ranks districts by absolute deviation from the national 1996 SIPO transaction-count share, then profiles the top outlier using region, salary A11, and unemployment A12/A13. No district is named without query output.

sql.national_and_district: WITH district_share AS (SELECT d.district_id, d."A2" AS district, d."A3" AS region, CAST(d."A11" AS numeric) AS avg_salary, CAST(d."A12" AS numeric) AS unemployment_1995, CAST(d."A13" AS numeric) AS unemployment_1996, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.k_symbol='SIPO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sipo_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.k_symbol='SIPO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::double precision/COUNT(*) AS sipo_share FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE))=1996 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6), national AS (SELECT SUM(sipo_count)::double precision/SUM(txn_count) AS national_sipo_share FROM district_share) SELECT ds.*, n.national_sipo_share, ds.sipo_share-n.national_sipo_share AS deviation, ABS(ds.sipo_share-n.national_sipo_share) AS abs_deviation FROM district_share ds CROSS JOIN national n ORDER BY abs_deviation DESC LIMIT 10;

sql.national_and_district: WITH district_share AS (SELECT d.district_id, d."A2" AS district, d."A3" AS region, CAST(d."A11" AS numeric) AS avg_salary, CAST(d."A12" AS numeric) AS unemployment_1995, CAST(d."A13" AS numeric) AS unemployment_1996, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.k_symbol='SIPO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sipo_count, SUM(CASE WHEN t.k_symbol='SIPO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::double precision/COUNT(*) AS sipo_share FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE))=1996 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6), national AS (SELECT SUM(sipo_count)::double precision/SUM(txn_count) AS national_sipo_share FROM district_share) SELECT ds.*, n.national_sipo_share, ds.sipo_share-n.national_sipo_share AS deviation, ABS(ds.sipo_share-n.national_sipo_share) AS abs_deviation FROM district_share ds CROSS JOIN national n ORDER BY abs_deviation DESC LIMIT 10;
